title: Find and Install an App
drDigitalIntro:
Time to find and install a real app.
• Search the store for something like a recipe manager or note-taker.
• Read the description, reviews, and permissions, then install it.
• Practice using it, updating it, and managing its permissions.
drDigitalSuccess: You can confidently install and manage apps!
drDigitalHint: Look at reviews and ratings to find quality apps.
